tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The laboratory results are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated HbA1c (6.2%), indicating impaired glucose tolerance or possible early diabetes. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are normal. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of lifestyle modification or further evaluation for glycemic control.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
